steps.title: Place the house before modernism
steps.content: The house in Calle Pedro Loza is named as one of Barragan's earlier Guadalajara projects. It is contrasted with later work that used functionalism and modernism after his travels in the 1930s.

steps.title: Reject timeline mistakes
steps.content: Choice A calls the house transitional, but the passage presents it as earlier than the shift. Choice C reverses the timeline by tying it to later international trends. Choice D overstates a lasting influence throughout his career. The supported claim is that its ornamentation and shape reflect an approach he later stopped using. The answer is B.
